name: SpacetimeDB Reducer Domain Adapter
summary: Keep reducers as transactional adapters that authorize, load, call explicit domain logic, persist, and emit platform records.

items: Resolve caller identity or subject and run explicit authz guards.
Load rows and aggregates through repository functions using indexed accessors.
Call the aggregate, domain service, or domain policy function that owns the rule.
Save through repository functions so table identity, mappers, and child reconciliation stay centralized.
Record action logs, events, exports, or other platform side effects inside the same transaction when they are table writes.

items.text: Reducer signatures use client-facing identifiers, not surrogate row ids unless row ids are the public contract.
Domain decisions are not implemented as ad hoc reducer conditionals.
External I/O is not performed in reducers.
